series_metadata.series_description: To record all property or persons released or received. (HP-60)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: White Copy - This form is attached to another report such as an OH-1, case investigation, HP-7, HP-25A, etc. and assunes this record''''s retention period. Pink Copy - Given to individual to whom the property or person is released or received. Yellow Copy - Retained in the receipt book until the last receipt has been used, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
